calendar.matters:
Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate [Ccp Sec. 1094.5]
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Michael E. Adams, Esq. of the LAW OFFICES OF MICHAEL E. ADAMS, T:650.269.8075, for petitioner/moving party;
Brandon Fields, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, T:510.879.0752, for real party in interest Public Utilities Commission.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.

Petitioner Morgan's petition for writ of administrative mandamus is denied.

[See word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.]

Mr. Fields is to prepare a proposed order that repeats verbatim the Court's ruling and submit it by email and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
